name: Firewall
description: Monitors and controls incoming and outgoing network traffic.

name: Disaster Recovery Plan
description: Provides steps for recovering from a major disaster.

name: Vulnerability Scanning
description: Identifies vulnerabilities in systems and applications.

name: Security Information and Event Management (SIEM)
description: Aggregates and analyzes security activity.

name: Encryption
description: Secures data by converting it into unreadable code.

name: Door and Facility Locks
description: Restricts physical access to sensitive areas.

name: Business Continuity Plan
description: Ensures that critical business functions continue during a disaster.

name: Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA)
description: Requires two or more verification methods for access.

name: Physical Security Controls
description: Secures physical access to critical systems.

name: Access Control Policy
description: Defines access privileges for employees.

name: Intrusion Detection System (IDS)
description: Detects suspicious activity and anomalies in the network.

name: Incident Response Plan
description: Provides guidelines for responding to security incidents.

name: Backup and Restore Procedures
description: Outlines steps to back up and restore data.

name: Patch Management
description: Regularly updates software to fix security vulnerabilities.

name: Network Segmentation
description: Divides networks into segments to limit access.

name: Data Loss Prevention (DLP)
description: Prevents sensitive data from being accessed or leaked.

name: Intrusion Prevention System (IPS)
description: Automatically blocks suspicious activity in the network.

name: Endpoint Detection and Response (EDR)
description: Provides real-time monitoring and response to endpoint threats.

name: Anti-Virus Software
description: Detects and removes malicious software.

name: Security Awareness Training
description: Educates employees on security best practices.
